Company logo for, Officeworks.
Officeworks


AI Engineer 

Chadstone, Victoria, Australia · Reposted 2 weeks ago · Over 100 people clicked apply

Promoted by hirer · Responses managed off LinkedIn

Full-time
Apply

Save
Your profile and resume are missing some required qualifications



Show match details

BETA • Is this information helpful?


People you can reach out to

Leng Lim

• 2nd

Senior Experience Designer | Equal mix of creativity, positivity and empathy | Anthophile & Durian enthusiast 🌻🌷🌼

People in your network


Connect
About the job
About Us

At Officeworks we make bigger things happen. Our customers, our team, and our community are our heart and soul. And if our brilliant people have taught us anything, it is that we can do all kinds of incredible things, each and every day.

Fast paced. Innovative. Inspiring. With close to 10,000 team members and a national footprint of more than 173 retail stores Australia wide – we’re focused on delivering a wide range, low price and great service. We’re about inspiring new ideas and thinking outside the box. We’re about kicking goals, having a laugh and pushing each other. We are about being rewarded and supported. We’re about teaching a customer something new and supporting the community. We’re about making a difference.

About The Role

We are scaling our AI team and investing in building real-world AI capability. As part of this growth, we are seeking an experienced AI Integration Engineer to design and build the infrastructure and AI agents that enables AI-powered solutions to operate within real business environments.

This is a hands-on role focused on integrating and development of AI agents into production systems, building scalable infrastructure, and delivering practical solutions that create measurable business value. You’ll work in a small, highly collaborative engineering team to turn strategic ideas into working products.

Important: This role requires demonstrated professional (commercial) experience delivering systems in real business environments. MLOPS experience and working with Agents in commercial setting will be highly regarded. Candidates with only, self-taught, or side-project experience will not be considered, but we encourage people from startup in series B and C to apply.

What You’ll Do

 Build full-stack infrastructure for AI prototypes and MVPs (backend services, APIs, and front-end interfaces) 
 Develop APIs and integration layers connecting AI agents with internal systems, databases, and third-party services 
 Implement orchestration and communication across multiple AI agents 
 Design and deliver scalable, secure systems from prototype through to production 
 Collaborate closely with engineering and product stakeholders to deliver end-to-end AI solutions 
 Build AI agents in collaboration with our Agent engineer 
 Debug, optimise, and evolve prototypes into stable, production-ready systems 


About You

You are a hands-on engineer who enjoys solving real business problems and has a track record of delivering working systems in a professional environment.

Essential Experience

5+ years of professional (commercial) software engineering experience
Proven track record of delivering production-grade systems in real business environments
Strong full-stack development capability
Strong Python experience, plus JavaScript or TypeScript
Experience building APIs and integrating systems in production
Experience with relational and/or non-relational databases (Snowflake highly regarded)
Experience with modern front-end frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue)
Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS or Google Cloud


Nice To Have

Experience working with AI-enabled systems or data engineering pipelines
MLOPS
Experience in startup, scale-up, or innovation-driven environments
Experience with complex system integrations or platform-level engineering


Our culture

Benefits

If you’re searching for an organisation that’s truly committed to its people, where you can thrive in a culture of togetherness, then join Officeworks and let’s make bigger things happen – for all of us! We celebrate our teams’ uniqueness by offering genuine team member benefits to the Officeworks family:

 We’re all about giving you the flexibility you need to keep things balanced to suit your individual needs. 
 Enjoy generous discounts across Officeworks, Bunnings, Kmart, Target and the wider Wesfarmers brands. 
 Access to our Officeworks benefits program for exclusive discounts and perks across entertainment, travel, lifestyle, and health. 
 Our Growing Families Policy supports team members during the exciting and challenging times of expanding their family 
 We prioritise safety, mental health and wellbeing, offering access to our Employee Assistance Program (EAP) as well as other ongoing programs 
 OurFlexible Public Holidays Policy supports those who observe cultural or religious holidays different from the standard public holidays in Australia 
 Take advantage of outstanding learning and development programs to support your career growth 
 Explore fantastic career opportunities across the broader Wesfarmers Group. 


At Officeworks, we operate best when our team represents the communities we serve. We proudly commit to providing a safe and supportive work environment for our team. We encourage applications from all candidates of all ages, cultures (including Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples), people with disabilities, and the LGBTQI+ community.

findings.summary: Candidate's projects demonstrate practical applications of AI, showcasing relevant capabilities for the role.
findings.detail: Projects include experience with operational intelligence, retrieval-augmented generation, and system integration which directly relate to the job's requirements.

job_evidence.name: Build full-stack infrastructure for AI prototypes and MVPs
job_evidence.excerpt: Build full-stack infrastructure for AI prototypes and MVPs (backend services, APIs, and front-end interfaces)

profile_evidence.excerpt: Domain-agnostic operational intelligence platform combining deterministic analytics with Large Language Model reasoning to analyse structured business data.
Enterprise retrieval-augmented generation platform supporting trustworthy AI responses over organisational knowledge.

summary.summary: While the candidate exhibits strong technical abilities and project experience in AI, they do not meet the specific commercial experience duration required for the role. Additionally, the ambiguity surrounding compensation and full-time engagement raises concerns on commercial fit. However, the candidate's portfolio aligns well with the role's expectations.

posting.raw_text:
Company logo for, Officeworks.
Officeworks


AI Engineer 

Chadstone, Victoria, Australia · Reposted 2 weeks ago · Over 100 people clicked apply

Promoted by hirer · Responses managed off LinkedIn

Full-time
Apply

Save
Your profile and resume are missing some required qualifications



Show match details

BETA • Is this information helpful?


People you can reach out to

Leng Lim

• 2nd

Senior Experience Designer | Equal mix of creativity, positivity and empathy | Anthophile & Durian enthusiast 🌻🌷🌼

People in your network


Connect
About the job
About Us

At Officeworks we make bigger things happen. Our customers, our team, and our community are our heart and soul. And if our brilliant people have taught us anything, it is that we can do all kinds of incredible things, each and every day.

Fast paced. Innovative. Inspiring. With close to 10,000 team members and a national footprint of more than 173 retail stores Australia wide – we’re focused on delivering a wide range, low price and great service. We’re about inspiring new ideas and thinking outside the box. We’re about kicking goals, having a laugh and pushing each other. We are about being rewarded and supported. We’re about teaching a customer something new and supporting the community. We’re about making a difference.

About The Role

We are scaling our AI team and investing in building real-world AI capability. As part of this growth, we are seeking an experienced AI Integration Engineer to design and build the infrastructure and AI agents that enables AI-powered solutions to operate within real business environments.

This is a hands-on role focused on integrating and development of AI agents into production systems, building scalable infrastructure, and delivering practical solutions that create measurable business value. You’ll work in a small, highly collaborative engineering team to turn strategic ideas into working products.

Important: This role requires demonstrated professional (commercial) experience delivering systems in real business environments. MLOPS experience and working with Agents in commercial setting will be highly regarded. Candidates with only, self-taught, or side-project experience will not be considered, but we encourage people from startup in series B and C to apply.

What You’ll Do

 Build full-stack infrastructure for AI prototypes and MVPs (backend services, APIs, and front-end interfaces) 
 Develop APIs and integration layers connecting AI agents with internal systems, databases, and third-party services 
 Implement orchestration and communication across multiple AI agents 
 Design and deliver scalable, secure systems from prototype through to production 
 Collaborate closely with engineering and product stakeholders to deliver end-to-end AI solutions 
 Build AI agents in collaboration with our Agent engineer 
 Debug, optimise, and evolve prototypes into stable, production-ready systems 


About You

You are a hands-on engineer who enjoys solving real business problems and has a track record of delivering working systems in a professional environment.

Essential Experience

5+ years of professional (commercial) software engineering experience
Proven track record of delivering production-grade systems in real business environments
Strong full-stack development capability
Strong Python experience, plus JavaScript or TypeScript
Experience building APIs and integrating systems in production
Experience with relational and/or non-relational databases (Snowflake highly regarded)
Experience with modern front-end frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue)
Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS or Google Cloud


Nice To Have

Experience working with AI-enabled systems or data engineering pipelines
MLOPS
Experience in startup, scale-up, or innovation-driven environments
Experience with complex system integrations or platform-level engineering


Our culture

Benefits

If you’re searching for an organisation that’s truly committed to its people, where you can thrive in a culture of togetherness, then join Officeworks and let’s make bigger things happen – for all of us! We celebrate our teams’ uniqueness by offering genuine team member benefits to the Officeworks family:

 We’re all about giving you the flexibility you need to keep things balanced to suit your individual needs. 
 Enjoy generous discounts across Officeworks, Bunnings, Kmart, Target and the wider Wesfarmers brands. 
 Access to our Officeworks benefits program for exclusive discounts and perks across entertainment, travel, lifestyle, and health. 
 Our Growing Families Policy supports team members during the exciting and challenging times of expanding their family 
 We prioritise safety, mental health and wellbeing, offering access to our Employee Assistance Program (EAP) as well as other ongoing programs 
 OurFlexible Public Holidays Policy supports those who observe cultural or religious holidays different from the standard public holidays in Australia 
 Take advantage of outstanding learning and development programs to support your career growth 
 Explore fantastic career opportunities across the broader Wesfarmers Group. 


At Officeworks, we operate best when our team represents the communities we serve. We proudly commit to providing a safe and supportive work environment for our team. We encourage applications from all candidates of all ages, cultures (including Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples), people with disabilities, and the LGBTQI+ community.
